Sheet Slicer

Grid Slice Sprite Sheets And Atlases

Pick an uploaded image asset, define a grid, preview the cut, and save slice metadata back into the record for terrain generation.

Asset Library Sheet Slicer Audio Intake Terrain Recipes
Image Assets
Select a terrain, structure, effect, monster, or character image to slice.
Slicing Flow
Use `AI Slice Plan` first, then grid-generate or drag manual boxes on the image.
  • Regular tileset: `AI Slice Plan` → `Generate Grid`
  • Mixed atlas: switch to `Manual` and drag slices
  • `Promote To Sub-Assets` when slices should become reusable records
Slice Config

Choose An Asset

Load an image record from the left to generate slice coordinates.

No asset selected
Choose an image asset to begin slicing.
Generated Slices
